name: Mcfabulous Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the 7-Up, buttermilk, and Bisquick to form a smooth dough.
2. Dip your hand into just enough more Bisquick so you can knead the dough in the bowl until it is smooth and elastic.
3. Shape the dough into 6 patties of equal size, approximately 1 inch thick.
4. Place one patty in the center of a greased 9-inch round baking pan. Arrange the other patties around it.
5. Wipe the tops of each with a dab of margarine or softened butter.
6. Bake at 450°F (very hot oven) for 18-20 minutes, or until tripled in size and golden brown.
7. Cool in the pan for 10 minutes before serving.
Makes 6 McFabulous flaky biscuits.
